mapper.insert: INSERT INTO budget_daily (user_id, category_id, month, monthly_budget, weekly_budget, alert_threshold, is_deleted, created_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{categoryId}, #{month}, #{monthlyBudget}, #{weeklyBudget}, #{alertThreshold}, false, NOW())

INSERT INTO budget_daily (user_id, category_id, month, monthly_budget, weekly_budget, alert_threshold, is_deleted, created_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{categoryId}, #{month}, #{monthlyBudget}, #{weeklyBudget}, #{alertThreshold}, false, NOW()) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE monthly_budget = VALUES(monthly_budget), weekly_budget = VALUES(weekly_budget), alert_threshold = VALUES(alert_threshold)
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, category_id, month, monthly_budget, weekly_budget, alert_threshold, is_deleted, created_at, updated_at FROM budget_daily WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND category_id = #{categoryId} AND month = #{month} AND is_deleted = 0
